name: vottun-ai-compliance
displayName: Vottun AI Compliance (EU AI Act Art. 50)
description: Open-source toolkit for certifying, watermarking, detecting and verifying AI-generated content. Uses Vottun backend endpoints with server-side watermarking.

capabilities.whatItDoes: Certify AI-generated text content on-chain (via /v1/certify). Server computes hashes and applies server-side watermarking.
Verify a certificate by cert id (vtn_...) or a 64-char content hash (via /v1/verify/{id_or_hash}).
Fetch certificate details by certificate id (via /v1/certs/{cert_id}). Requires VOTTUN_API_KEY (X-API-Key).

env.VOTTUN_API_KEY: optional; required for get_certificate/listing that needs authenticated endpoints
